title: Distribution pending envelope
description: Approval-gate wrapper around a single (story, target-platform) distribution draft. Written by distribution/stage.py from the daily cron; the operator moves it to distribution/approved/ or distribution/rejected/ via distribution.publish. The envelope holds metadata + a reference to the underlying draft on disk — not the draft content itself, so a re-render to drafts/ between staging and publish auto-propagates.

draft_path.description: Relative path from repo root to the underlying draft JSON.

media_path.description: Relative path to associated media (e.g. videos/<date>_<story>.mp4 for youtube_shorts).

publish_result.description: Filled in by the actual posting workflow when status flips to `published`.
